questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using e-tendering systems for online bids, from the perspective of a buyer?
questions.hint: Explain the benefits of online bidding for buyers

questions.question: A supplier fails to meet the technical requirements specified in the online bid document. What should the buyer do?
questions.hint: Outline the steps the buyer should take in this scenario

questions.question: Describe the potential risks associated with using online bidding systems, from the perspective of a supplier.
questions.hint: Explain the security and technical risks involved
